song.title: Heaven Fall Down
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Open our eyes, Lord let us see All that You are, all that You mean Open our ears, Lord let us hear All that You are, be loud and clear Please be near
[P] As our praises rise, May Your presence fall!
[C] Chorus Heaven, Heaven fall down! Spirit, Spirit pour out! On us all now, Heaven fall down
[V2] 2) Come, Jesus, come Come like the wind Fill up this place we welcome You in Come, Jesus, come Come like the rain Open the sky, show us Your face Oh, Lord we wait
[B] We're crying out in desperation, Waiting now in expectation, Crying out in desperation, For You
